title: thelymitra vulgaris
intro: Thelymitra vulgaris, also known as the Common Duck Orchid, is a species of orchid native to Australia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Thelymitra vulgaris include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared as a tincture, infusion, or decoction, allowing for various herbal preparations to be made for medicinal use.
